chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1530 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of matter 1. For orders on CMA No.3875/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on CMA No.3876/2023 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on CMA No.3877/2023 (Review) 01.06.2023 Mr. Ashique Hussain Chhalgri, Advocate for respondents No.4 & 5/applicants..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency application is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. By means of this application, respondents No.4 & 5 seek review of the order dated 03.05.2023, whereby instant petition was disposed of directing to respondents to pay the leave encashment, commutation and past pension of 15 months to the petitioner within thirty days of the order, so also future pension regularly. The review of the aforementioned order has been sought on the ground that respondents No.4 & 5 have no funds for payment of service benefits of the petitioner. It may be observed that the service benefits are rights of a retired employee of an institution, which are to be paid promptly. No jurisdictional error or defect has been shown floating on the face of the order dated 03.05.2023 by learned counsel appearing for respondents No.4 & 5; hence, this application being devoid of merits is dismissed accordingly. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
